comments.comment: This substance is below MDL in all liquid process streams. The substance was detected in the solids stream, indicating it is present at some concentration in the influent stream. This substance is not generated as part of the treatment process and reflects what the facility received via the sewer system.

There has been no significant change in the release of this substance to off-site disposal or recycling. The substance was not previously reported as the mass released fell under the reporting threshold. Reporting of release to water is new this year. The sum of the released to water plus offsite disposal and recycling is above the reporting threshold, resulting in the need to report release of this substance.
